title: Making name tags
excerpt: I host a lot of events and need to make name tags for my contacts. Can I do that using Monday.com? Or is there a product that I can integrate with Monday that could do that?

posts.author: hippophobia_cheese (Tim)
posts.cookedHtml: I host a lot of events and need to make name tags for my contacts. Can I do that using Monday.com? Or is there a product that I can integrate with Monday that could do that?

posts.author: PolishedGeek (Polished Geek | Platinum Partner)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, @hippophobia_cheese - Have you checked out DocuGen, which can pull data from your boards into Google Doc templates? It’s in the Marketplace so you can install it and I think it’s very affordable for occasional use.

P.S. Would love to hear the story of how you came up with that username.
